checkpoint.summary: PHASE_008 complete. All three units landed: unit_034 (fleet-mode guard in Claude Code continue-loop.py + test_continue_loop_claude.py with 5 cases), unit_035 (same guard mirrored into the Cursor continue-loop.py + test_continue_loop_cursor.py with 5 cases -- Cursor protocol differs: always exits 0, stop vs continue encoded in stdout JSON), unit_036 (unit-test acceptance pre-satisfied by 034+035 test files; manual verification checklist added as a new subsection under 'Rollback / Failure Considerations' in PHASE_008_stop-hook-fleet-awareness.md walking through mid-batch kill -> new session -> hook stops cleanly -> /sync surfaces orphans -> teardown_batch recovers -> /invoke restarts). Test suite 173 -> 183 (+10 across both hook test files). The Stop hook now refuses to auto-continue into an inconsistent post-crash state regardless of whether the caller is Cursor (followup_message protocol) or Claude Code (exit-2 block-continue protocol).
checkpoint.next_action: Run PHASE_008 phase completion review (pr-review-checklist + code-review skill), open PR, autonomous squash-merge per harness-git.md, then advance to unit_037 in PHASE_009 (safety-rails-and-automatic-fallback: session-scoped kill switch that writes .harness/.parallel-disabled after 2 scope_violation or ambiguity failures).
